'''jaduthu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:moa|moa]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-d-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:moa|moa]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| jaduthu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:jædithith|jædithith]] || [[word:jædithij|jædithij]] || [[word:jædithish|jædithish]] || [[word:jædithi|jædithi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:jaduduthuth|jaduduthuth]] || [[word:jaduduthuj|jaduduthuj]] || [[word:jaduduthush|jaduduthush]] || [[word:jaduduthu|jaduduthu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:jaduthuth|jaduthuth]] || [[word:jaduthuj|jaduthuj]] || [[word:jaduthush|jaduthush]] || [[word:jaduthu|jaduthu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:jadufthuth|jadufthuth]] || [[word:jadufthuj|jadufthuj]] || [[word:jadufthush|jadufthush]] || [[word:jadufthuf|jadufthuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:jaduthuthu|jaduthuthu]] || [[word:jaduthuju|jaduthuju]] || [[word:jaduthushu|jaduthushu]] || [[word:jaduthuku|jaduthuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:jaduthuth|jaduthuth]] || [[word:jaduthuj|jaduthuj]] || [[word:jaduthush|jaduthush]] || [[word:jaduthu|jaduthu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:jaduthuthul|jaduthuthul]] || [[word:jaduthujul|jaduthujul]] || [[word:jaduthushul|jaduthushul]] || [[word:jaduthukul|jaduthukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:jaduthuthuthu|jaduthuthuthu]] || [[word:jaduthujuju|jaduthujuju]] || [[word:jaduthushushu|jaduthushushu]] || [[word:jaduthuku|jaduthuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:jaduthuthun|jaduthuthun]] || [[word:jaduthujun|jaduthujun]] || [[word:jaduthushun|jaduthushun]] || [[word:jaduthukun|jaduthukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:jaduthuthuoro|jaduthuthuoro]] || [[word:jaduthujuoro|jaduthujuoro]] || [[word:jaduthushuoro|jaduthushuoro]] || [[word:jaduthukuoro|jaduthukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5390c6a}}
